title: Single-pathologist owner-operator lab — capacity creation framing
description: Tiny owner-operator lab (18k slides/yr, 1 pathologist FTE — the owner). Productivity 'savings' cannot be redeployed as FTE reduction because there's only one FTE. Edge case from research/edge_cases.md: handled by reframing pillar as 'capacity creation' in Claude narrative. Without Claude, the productivity pillar still computes numerically but the dashboard framing must change.

expected.notes: With ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset, the productivity pillar shows as raw FTE-time dollar value. In a full test run with Claude enabled, dashboardInsight() should reframe it as 'hours of additional case throughput capacity' not 'FTE cost saved'.
